moments.title: The Open Championship Reaches Climax
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship continues at Royal Birkdale Golf Club, with the final rounds playing out this weekend to crown golf's Champion Golfer of the Year.

angles.name: Weekend Spectacle
angles.copy: Who's got the nerve to take home the Claret Jug from Royal Birkdale this weekend? The Open Championship is down to its final thrilling rounds!

angles.name: Golfing Drama
angles.copy: It's all to play for at The Open! Every shot matters as the world's best golfers battle it out on the greens of Royal Birkdale. Tune in!

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Hold UK No.1
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' secures its 17th non-consecutive week at the top of the Official UK Singles Chart, nearing the all-time record.

angles.name: Chart Reign
angles.copy: Seventeen weeks at Number 1 and counting! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is a phenomenon. Can it break the all-time record next week?

angles.name: British Record
angles.copy: 'Rein Me In' is now the longest-running British No.1 ever! Huge congratulations to Sam Fender and Olivia Dean on making chart history.

moments.title: World Cup Fever on the UK Chart
moments.blurb: Despite England's semi-final defeat, football anthems 'Wonderwall' by Oasis and 'Three Lions' surge to Numbers 2 and 3 on the Official UK Singles Chart, alongside Shakira's official World Cup song.

angles.name: Football Anthems
angles.copy: It might not be coming home, but 'Wonderwall' and 'Three Lions' are roaring up the charts! Proving football fever is still well and truly here.

angles.name: Oasis Chart Resurgence
angles.copy: 'Anyway, here's Wonderwall' – now at Number 2 on the UK chart! Oasis fans and England supporters unite, thirty years on.

moments.title: London Athletics Meet Tomorrow
moments.blurb: The London Athletics Meet, a highlight of the season, takes place tomorrow, July 18, at the London Stadium, featuring world-class track and field athletes.

angles.name: Track and Field Action
angles.copy: Get ready for a super Saturday! The London Athletics Meet brings global stars to the London Stadium tomorrow for a day of incredible track and field.

angles.name: Athletics in the Capital
angles.copy: World-class athletes descending on London tomorrow for the Athletics Meet! Who are you excited to see compete at the London Stadium?

moments.title: Splendour Festival's Final Weekend
moments.blurb: Nottingham's Splendour Festival returns for its final ever edition this weekend, July 18-19, at Wollaton Hall, featuring headliners The Wombats and Snow Patrol.

angles.name: Last Ever Splendour
angles.copy: It's the end of an era! Splendour Festival is holding its final ever event this weekend at Wollaton Hall. Who's heading to say goodbye?

angles.name: Nottingham's Big Weekend
angles.copy: The Wombats and Snow Patrol headline as Splendour Festival bows out in style this weekend. Nottingham, are you ready for the final party?

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival Concludes
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, wraps up its four-day celebration of traditional and contemporary Scottish music tomorrow, July 18.

angles.name: HebCelt Finale
angles.copy: Last chance to soak up the atmosphere at the Hebridean Celtic Festival! The Outer Hebrides has been buzzing with incredible music this week.

angles.name: Scottish Culture
angles.copy: Celebrating the best of Scottish music and culture, the HebCelt Festival finishes up tomorrow. What's been your highlight if you're there?

moments.title: Happy 74th Birthday, David Hasselhoff
moments.blurb: American actor and singer David Hasselhoff, known for 'Knight Rider' and 'Baywatch', celebrates his 74th birthday today.

angles.name: The Hoff Turns 74
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to the legendary David Hasselhoff! From Knight Rider to Baywatch, what's your favourite Hoff moment?

angles.name: Music & TV Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 74th birthday to David Hasselhoff! Still 'Looking for Freedom' and entertaining millions.

moments.title: Happy 77th Birthday, Geezer Butler
moments.blurb: Geezer Butler, the iconic bassist and primary lyricist for Black Sabbath, celebrates his 77th birthday today.

angles.name: Sabbath Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the one and only Geezer Butler! The lyrical genius behind Black Sabbath's heaviest tracks. What's your favourite Sabbath song?

angles.name: Heavy Metal Pioneer
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to Black Sabbath's Geezer Butler, 77 today! A true pioneer of heavy metal bass and songwriting.

moments.title: Happy 50th Birthday, Luke Bryan
moments.blurb: American country music superstar Luke Bryan, known for hits like 'Country Girl (Shake It for Me)', celebrates his 50th birthday today.

angles.name: Country Star Turns 50
angles.copy: Happy 50th Birthday to country music sensation Luke Bryan! Raise a glass to the 'Country Girl' hitmaker.

angles.name: Half Century of Hits
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 50th birthday to Luke Bryan! What's your favourite track from the American Idol judge?

moments.title: Happy 32nd Birthday, Kali Uchis
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning American-Colombian singer-songwriter Kali Uchis, blending R&B, soul, and pop, turns 32 today.

angles.name: Kali Uchis Day
angles.copy: Happy 32nd Birthday to the incredible Kali Uchis! Her unique blend of R&B, soul, and pop continues to captivate.

angles.name: Genre-Bending Artist
angles.copy: Sending birthday love to Kali Uchis, 32 today! Which of her tracks is currently on repeat for you?

moments.title: Happy 39th Birthday, Jeremih
moments.blurb: American R&B singer-songwriter Jeremih, known for his debut hit 'Birthday Sex', celebrates his 39th birthday today.

angles.name: R&B Star's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 39th Birthday to R&B hitmaker Jeremih! We're definitely playing 'Birthday Sex' today.

angles.name: Still a Hitmaker
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 39th to Jeremih! From 'Birthday Sex' to countless collaborations, his sound is iconic.

moments.title: Happy 41st Birthday, Tom Fletcher
moments.blurb: Tom Fletcher, lead vocalist and guitarist of McFly and a successful children's author, celebrates his 41st birthday today.

angles.name: McFly Frontman's Day
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to McFly's Tom Fletcher! From pop-punk anthems to best-selling books, he does it all.

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 41st birthday to the multi-talented Tom Fletcher! What's your favourite McFly track?

moments.title: Happy 44th Birthday, Natasha Hamilton
moments.blurb: Natasha Hamilton, singer in the hugely successful British girl group Atomic Kitten, celebrates her 44th birthday today.

angles.name: Atomic Kitten's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 44th Birthday to Atomic Kitten's Natasha Hamilton! Time to blast some early 00s pop anthems.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 44th birthday to Natasha Hamilton! What's your favourite Atomic Kitten hit?

moments.title: Happy 48th Birthday, Panda Bear
moments.blurb: Noah Lennox, known by his stage name Panda Bear and a founding member of Animal Collective, celebrates his 48th birthday today.

angles.name: Indie Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 48th Birthday to Panda Bear (Noah Lennox)! A true innovator in indie and electronic music. What's your favourite Animal Collective track?

angles.name: Experimental Artist
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 48th birthday to the visionary Panda Bear! Dive into his unique sound today.

moments.title: Glasgow Commonwealth Games Opening Ceremony Approaching
moments.blurb: The Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games officially begin with the Opening Ceremony at the OVO Hydro on Thursday, July 23, marking the start of 11 days of sporting action.

angles.name: Games Kick Off
angles.copy: Glasgow 2026 is almost here! The Commonwealth Games Opening Ceremony on Thursday marks the start of an incredible 11 days of sport in Scotland.

angles.name: Scotland's Big Event
angles.copy: The King's Baton Relay culminates this week as Glasgow prepares to host the Commonwealth Games Opening Ceremony. Who's excited for the action?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Next Week
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, featuring a diverse lineup of music, comedy, arts, and more.

angles.name: Suffolk Festival Buzz
angles.copy: Who's ready for Latitude next week? Henham Park is about to come alive with four days of amazing music and arts! #LatitudeFestival

angles.name: Arts & Music Escape
angles.copy: Counting down to Latitude! From music headliners to comedy tents, what's on your must-see list in Suffolk next week?

moments.title: Big Love Festival in South Wales
moments.blurb: The Big Love Festival, a small, family-friendly music festival, celebrates its 10th year in the South Wales countryside this July.

angles.name: Welsh Festival Fun
angles.copy: Big Love Festival is back in South Wales this July for its 10th anniversary! Who's heading to the friendliest small festival in the UK?

angles.name: South Wales Sounds
angles.copy: Celebrating a decade of music and community! Big Love Festival brings bands and DJs to the beautiful Welsh countryside. Grab your tickets!

moments.title: Summer School Holidays Underway Across UK
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays are now in full swing across much of the UK, with England's and Scotland's breaks beginning this week, joining Wales which started earlier.

angles.name: School's Out for Summer
angles.copy: Summer holidays are officially HERE for most of the UK! What are your big plans for the long break?

angles.name: Family Fun Time
angles.copy: It's summer holiday season! Whether you're staying local or heading off on an adventure, we hope you have a fantastic time.

moments.title: T100 Triathlon London Next Weekend
moments.blurb: The T100 Triathlon Series comes to London next weekend, July 25-26, bringing elite triathlon action to the capital.

angles.name: Triathlon in the Capital
angles.copy: Get ready for some serious endurance! The T100 Triathlon hits London next weekend. Who's going to cheer on the athletes?

angles.name: London Sporting Event
angles.copy: The T100 Triathlon is bringing world-class competition to London next Saturday and Sunday. Expect incredible feats of strength and stamina!
